name: Chicken Wings in Five Spice
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Peanut oil for deep frying
1/8 cup Dry sherry or Chinese rice wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each wing into 3 pieces, saving the tips for soup and using only the meatier parts for this recipe.
2. Prepare the marinade by combining all ingredients.
3. Marinate the wing pieces for 30 minutes.
4. Drain the wings and toss them in water chestnut flour.
5. Deep fry at 360°F until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
